description: Markdown commentary on a text passage or on another BKK record. Exactly one of `anchor` (passage) or `parent` (reply to another record) must be present; this constraint is enforced by the harvester since the lexicon schema cannot express xor.

textId.description: BKK source-text identifier the comment relates to. Kept even on pure replies to support text-scoped indexing and filtering.

edition.description: Short edition id; required when `anchor` is present.

anchor.description: Anchored span this comment is about. Mutually exclusive with `parent`.

parent.description: Direct parent record being replied to. Mutually exclusive with `anchor`.

root.description: Thread root for replies; equals `parent` for top-level replies. Bluesky convention.

body.description: Comment body. Format is given by `format` (currently always `markdown`).

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag of `body` (e.g. en, zh-Hant, ja). Defaults to en when absent.

format.description: Body format. `markdown` is the only currently defined value; reserved enum leaves room for `plain`.

supersedes.description: CID of a prior comment this one replaces.

strongRef.description: AT-Protocol strong reference (uri + cid) to another record.
